template_module.title: GOV.UK Pattern Code Template
template_module.description: Template for generating a code skeleton for a page or pattern in the GOV.UK Design System. This may include combining multiple components into a cohesive page and providing hooks for dynamic data.

body.instruction: Generate a code skeleton to implement the pattern "{{pattern}}" in the specified language ({{language}}). Include the following elements:

checklist.entry: Required components defined by the pattern (for example, back link, heading, summary list, task list).
Placeholder areas where dynamic content will be inserted.
Navigation controls such as continue buttons or links to other tasks.
Annotations explaining how the pattern adheres to the design system guidance.

body.instruction: Comment on how the code enforces accessibility best practices and link to relevant GOV.UK guidance. Include citations where possible.
